title: HPF AI Disclosure Schema
description: JSON Schema for HPF AI Disclosure metadata. v0.9 draft for consultation. Published by Human Provenance in Film under CC BY 4.0. Both fields are required when an HPF record is present. Where no HPF declaration exists, omit the record entirely rather than writing null field values.

hpf_taxonomy_version.description: The version of the HPF Taxonomy applied to this record.

hpf_classification.description: The HPF disclosure tier for this production. Derived from a signed producer declaration held in the chain of title.
